summary: Iteration 28 - Stripe Payment Portal Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: (1) Payments tab with badge count for pending payments, (2) Proposal cards with full price breakdown (Original Fee, Promo discount, Additional discount, Total Fee, Paid, Pending Amount), (3) Pay Now button for approved sales with pending amount, (4) Stripe checkout redirect working (redirects to checkout.stripe.com), (5) Payment Success page with status polling, (6) Payment Cancel redirects to login/dashboard. Fixed bug: pending_amount calculation for sales without explicit pending_amount field.
critical_code_review_comments: Email service is MOCKED - logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
Stripe uses Emergent test key (sk_test_emergent) via emergentintegrations library
Fixed: pending_amount calculation added to /api/payments/my-proposals for sales without explicit pending_amount field
seed_data_creation: promo.client@test.com with approved sale (Canada PR, ₹38,000 total, ₹10,000 paid, ₹28,000 pending) created in previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified all Stripe payment portal features: (1) GET /api/payments/my-proposals - returns client's sales with product_name, partner_name, fee breakdown, payment_history, discount fields, (2) POST /api/payments/create-checkout - creates Stripe checkout session for approved sale with pending amount, returns url and session_id, (3) GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} - returns payment status for a session, (4) GET /api/payments/history/{sale_id} - returns payment transactions for a sale, (5) POST /api/webhook/stripe - Stripe webhook endpoint exists. Frontend: Payments tab shows proposal cards with price breakdown, Pay Now button initiates Stripe checkout, Payment Success page polls for status, Payment Cancel redirects to dashboard.

backend_endpoints.my_proposals: PASS - GET /api/payments/my-proposals returns sales with price breakdown, discount fields, payment_transactions
backend_endpoints.create_checkout_approved: PASS - POST /api/payments/create-checkout creates Stripe session for approved sale with pending amount
backend_endpoints.create_checkout_rejects_invalid: PASS - POST /api/payments/create-checkout returns 404 for non-existent sale
backend_endpoints.stripe_webhook: PASS - POST /api/webhook/stripe endpoint exists and responds
backend_endpoints.full_flow: PASS - Complete flow: proposals → checkout → status → history

frontend_features.payments_tab_badge: PASS - Payments tab shows badge count for pending payments
frontend_features.proposal_card: PASS - Proposal card shows product name, partner, status, price breakdown
frontend_features.price_breakdown: PASS - Shows Original Fee, Promo discount, Additional discount, Total Fee, Paid, Pending Amount
frontend_features.pay_now_button: PASS - Pay Now button visible for approved sales with pending amount
frontend_features.stripe_redirect: PASS - Pay Now click redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct amount (₹28,000)
frontend_features.payment_success_page: PASS - /payment-success renders and shows 'Verifying Payment...' with polling

bug_fixed.issue: pending_amount not displayed for sales without explicit pending_amount field in database
bug_fixed.root_cause: Seed data for client@leamss.com didn't set pending_amount field, and backend didn't calculate it
bug_fixed.fix: Added pending_amount calculation in /api/payments/my-proposals: if pending_amount is None, calculate as fee_amount - amount_received

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - send_email logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
